summary: Exclude pre-window fixture setup from the Windows project-portability long-task measurement without weakening encode/decode observation.

decisions.decision: Observe non-buffered browser long-task entries after the near-limit random asset and cancellation fixtures are prepared and before the timed encode/decode operations begin; retain the exact zero-long-task and heartbeat assertions during the product operations.
decisions.rationale: The observer was created after fixture setup but requested buffered entries, so Windows replayed one earlier setup task while Ubuntu and the local browser replayed none. That cross-host result measured browser history outside the intended product-operation window. Non-buffered observation still begins before encode and remains active until 50 ms after decode, while the independent heartbeat continues to detect main-thread delay.

testEvidence.criterion: The near-limit profile must measure the real ZIP encode/decode window and continue failing on any long task or 50 ms heartbeat gap within that window.
testEvidence.test: Run the source-window regression and the one real 92 MiB Playwright portability profile, then strict types and scoped lint.

red.command: GitHub Actions run 29666335068 job 88137259000; pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/portability-profile-contract.test.ts
red.outcome: RED: hosted Windows browser acceptance completed the byte/cancellation journey but reported longTaskCount=1 from buffered history; the new regression failed 1/1 because non-buffered observation did not exist. Ubuntu passed the same product journey.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/portability-profile-contract.test.ts; pnpm.cmd exec playwright test tests/e2e/m2-portability-profile.e2e.ts; pnpm.cmd run typecheck; pnpm.cmd exec biome lint tests/e2e/fixtures/m2-portability-profile.ts tests/scripts/portability-profile-contract.test.ts
green.outcome: GREEN: 1/1 regression and 1/1 real browser profile passed. The 92 MiB artifact round-tripped exactly with longTaskCount=0, longestLongTaskMs=0, maximumHeartbeatGapMs=17.4, cancellationMs=13.8, peakHeapDeltaBytes=192388246, and exact source/decoded asset checks; TypeScript and scoped Biome passed. Independent review confirmed the observer and heartbeat span the complete encode/decode window plus delivery drain and returned strict 0/0/0/0/0.

nearMisses.sought: Why only hosted Windows reported a long task while product byte and cancellation assertions remained green
nearMisses.confirmation: PerformanceObserver was started after fixture setup with buffered=true, allowing the browser to replay pre-window long tasks into the encode/decode result.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
